full_text:
Xue Rong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Rong. Suggested that Sun Hao should follow the example of Liu Shan and surrender. Xue Rong may not have existed in history. Xue Rong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
